# Bad Decisions Studio

> Creative technology education and content brand.

Bad Decisions Studio (BDS) is a creative technology brand run by brothers Faraz Shababi (Commander) and Farhad Shababi, operating across Vancouver and Dubai. BDS teaches millions to build with Unreal Engine, AI, and emerging creative tools through free YouTube tutorials, premium courses, a podcast, and live events.

## Offerings

### The Bad Decisions Podcast
Tech, AI, and creative culture broken down for builders, artists, and entrepreneurs. New episodes every Tuesday and Friday. Featuring conversations with founders, CEOs, and creative leaders.
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/12jUe4lIJgxE4yst7rrfmW
- Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/bad-decisions-podcast/id1677462934
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@badxstudio

### Education
- Ultimate Unreal Engine Program: https://learn.baddecisions.studio
- Ultimate AI for Creatives Program: https://ai.baddecisions.studio
- Student Login / Academy: https://academy.baddecisions.studio
- Free tutorials on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@badxstudio

### Services
Cinematic production, AI integration, corporate training, interactive experiences, podcast sponsorship, and content strategy. Clients include Epic Games, Dell, YouTube, Snapchat, Dubai Police, A2RL, Polycam, Autodesk, and others across the US, Canada, Europe, and the Middle East.

## Key Stats
- 15M+ YouTube views
- 10M+ monthly reach across platforms
- 300K+ Instagram followers
- 271K+ YouTube subscribers
- 47K+ TikTok followers
- 1,500+ students enrolled
- 80+ countries reached
- 100+ podcast episodes

## Founders
- Faraz Shababi (Commander) — Co-founder
- Farhad Shababi — Co-founder
